title: asplenium scolopendrium subsp. scolopendrium
intro: Asplenium scolopendrium subsp. scolopendrium, also known as Hart's tongue fern, is a species of fern native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asplenium scolopendrium subsp. scolopendrium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support immune function. Asplenium scolopendrium subsp. scolopendrium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused in oil for various medicinal applications.
